---
mode: edit
description: Add Google-style docstrings and inline comments to the current file
---

Add documentation to the current file following the project guidelines:

- Add **Google style docstrings** to all functions and classes that are missing them.
- Add **inline comments** to any complex or non-obvious logic.
- Do not change any existing logic or functionality.
- Write all documentation in **English**.

Before making changes, show a summary of what you plan to document and wait for confirmation.
